description_long: This shotgun features a robust, cylindrical barrel with a segmented, ribbed design and metallic gray panels interspersed with bold red bands along its length. The body is predominantly matte black, with a compact, angular receiver and a short, ergonomic pistol grip for one-handed operation. The barrel is unusually thick and long, with a series of evenly spaced metallic ribs that provide a reinforced, industrial appearance. The trigger area is protected by a small, squared guard, and a red accent panel with a mechanical motif is visible above the grip. The muzzle is circular and reinforced, suggesting a single-barrel configuration. The overall design is modern and tactical, with a focus on durability and visual impact.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a long, ribbed barrel, metallic gray and red accents, and a compact pistol grip. The design is robust and industrial, emphasizing durability and visual strength.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the ribbed barrel, red accent bands, and the compact pistol grip with a visible red mechanical panel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, the segmented ribbing along the barrel, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same ribbed barrel and grip, with the red accents and mechanical details mirrored from the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and grip, with the ribbed barrel segments converging toward the muzzle.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with segmented ribbing and a reinforced, elongated design
attribute_trigger_guard_design: small, squared trigger guard with a compact profile and no visible finger grooves
